data_source.name: ASER Centre Annual Status of Education Report 2024 district estimate PDFs
data_source.access_note: Public district-level PDFs are downloaded by scripts/acquire_aser_data.py. Student intervention records are synthetic NGO monitoring records calibrated from public ASER district learning levels.

issues.description: Missing required values filled with median or Unknown according to field type.
Duplicate student identifiers removed before analytics generation.
Rows outside score, age, attendance, and date-order validation rules were excluded.
Extreme numeric values were winsorized using percentile caps after z-score detection.
